allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: M3-001 is pushed. This scope implements M3-002 CUDA worker wrapper around LLaMA-Factory config/dataset conversion, runner protocol, sanitized job events, and ModelRun terminal artifact updates.

phase_notes.plan: Implement M3-002 only: CUDA train handler, LLaMA-Factory YAML/dataset conversion, runner protocol, log/metric JobEvents, adapter manifest/hash terminal updates. Keep MLX, checkpoint/resume, API, and DB schema out of scope.

phase_notes.build: In progress: add runtime adapter, CUDA handler, training store worker update helpers, config fixture, and focused tests.
phase_notes.check: Pending: task JSON, py_compile, focused pytest, import boundary, and diff whitespace checks.
phase_notes.done: Pending: update WORKING closeout, commit, and push after verification passes.

pabcd.approved_scope: M3-002 CUDA wrapper worker/runtime/tests within listed paths.
